en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: mahica tu. ayza a demiad pasubana’ ku saydan titaan tu kakanan hicahan nu Sakizaya musakamu.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的撒奇萊雅語怎麼說。
en: A: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to speak Sechlaiah for food.

ab: matineng mitengil tu kamu nu saydan kisu?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: saydan, caay katineng mitengil kaku. taneng muliyaw aca musakamu?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: caay pakatengil kaku, satabakien ku ngiha’?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: na azihen tini! kilulen ku nipiasip aku.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.
Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.

ab: saydan, katawalan aku miala ku sapisulit.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: saydan, makatawal aku miala ku sabulic.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: caliwen ku i tepalay a kaput tu sabulic.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: pacaliwen kaku tu sabulic kapah haw?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: hayni tu kita, ayaw tu a lipay masasuazih.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
